inputs.text:
{
  "high_level_description": "A sleek, modern logo for ComfyUI rendered in a warm, inviting 3D isometric style with soft lighting and a cozy, tactile aesthetic.",
  "style_description": {
    "aesthetics": "Minimalist yet warm, with a focus on tactile textures and soft gradients. The design feels inviting and approachable, evoking comfort and ease of use.",
    "lighting": "Soft ambient lighting with a subtle rim light to emphasize depth and dimension. Warm key light from the upper left to create gentle shadows and highlights.",
    "medium": "3D rendering with post-processing for a painterly, tactile finish. Subtle grain and texture to enhance the cozy, handcrafted feel.",
    "art_style": "Isometric 3D with a modern, friendly twist. Clean lines, rounded edges, and a harmonious color palette to convey simplicity and warmth.",
    "color_palette": [
      "#F5E6D3",
      "#E8B4A0",
      "#D48C70",
      "#A66F59",
      "#8B5A4A",
      "#6B4A3F"
    ]
  },
  "compositional_deconstruction": {
    "background": "A soft, gradient backdrop transitioning from warm peach (#F5E6D3) at the top to a deeper terracotta (#D48C70) at the bottom. Subtle noise texture adds a tactile, organic feel. A faint, diffused radial glow emanates from the center to draw focus to the logo.",
    "elements": [
      {
        "type": "obj",
        "bbox": [
          250,
          250,
          750,
          750
        ],
        "desc": "The ComfyUI logo rendered as a 3D isometric cube with rounded edges. The cube appears to be made of a soft, fabric-like material in a warm terracotta (#D48C70) with subtle stitching details along the edges. The top face of the cube features a minimalist, embroidered-style 'C' in a lighter cream (#F5E6D3), slightly raised to catch the light. The cube casts a soft shadow beneath it, grounding it in the scene.",
        "color_palette": [
          "#D48C70",
          "#F5E6D3",
          "#A66F59",
          "#E8B4A0"
        ]
      },
      {
        "type": "text",
        "bbox": [
          300,
          200,
          400,
          800
        ],
        "text": "ComfyUI",
        "desc": "A clean, modern sans-serif typeface in a warm cream (#F5E6D3) with a subtle drop shadow for depth. The text is centered below the logo, slightly curved to follow the implied arc of the radial glow. The font is friendly and approachable, with rounded terminals to match the cozy aesthetic.",
        "color_palette": [
          "#F5E6D3",
          "#8B5A4A"
        ]
      },
      {
        "type": "obj",
        "bbox": [
          200,
          200,
          300,
          300
        ],
        "desc": "A small, abstract decorative element resembling a folded fabric corner or a cozy blanket edge. Rendered in the same terracotta (#D48C70) as the logo, with subtle highlights to suggest texture. Positioned to the upper left of the logo for balance.",
        "color_palette": [
          "#D48C70",
          "#E8B4A0"
        ]
      },
      {
        "type": "obj",
        "bbox": [
          700,
          700,
          800,
          800
        ],
        "desc": "A tiny, embroidered-style star or asterisk in cream (#F5E6D3), adding a playful, handcrafted detail. Positioned to the lower right of the logo for visual interest and balance.",
        "color_palette": [
          "#F5E6D3",
          "#A66F59"
        ]
      },
      {
        "type": "bg",
        "bbox": [
          0,
          0,
          1000,
          1000
        ],
        "desc": "A warm, gradient background transitioning from peach (#F5E6D3) at the top to terracotta (#D48C70) at the bottom. Subtle noise texture adds a tactile, organic feel. A faint radial glow emanates from the center, creating a soft vignette effect that draws the eye inward. The glow is warm and diffused, enhancing the cozy, inviting atmosphere."
      }
    ]
  }
}
